dict.string: /var/log/org.churchofjesuschrist.log
Off
MSTeams zoom.us Webex
https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_2d64ce7f0042ad68234a2515211adb067ad6714703dd8ebd6f33c1ab30354b1d
https://use2.ics.services.jamfcloud.com/icon/hash_d3a3bc5e06d2db5f9697f9b4fa095bfecb2dc0d22c71aadea525eb38ff981d39
Assembled IT Support
rescue@company.com
https://support.company.com
Update macOS on Mac
https://support.apple.com/108382
[Update macOS on Mac](https://support.apple.com/108382)
Assembled For assistance, please contact **{supportTeamName}** by clicking the (?) button in the bottom, right-hand corner.
Assembled For assistance, please contact **{supportTeamName}** by clicking the (?) button in the bottom, right-hand corner.
Assembled Bei Fragen wenden Sie sich ueber die (?) Schaltflaeche unten rechts an **{supportTeamName}**.
Assembled Pour obtenir de l aide, contactez **{supportTeamName}** via le bouton (?) en bas a droite.
Assembled Para obtener ayuda, contacte con **{supportTeamName}** haciendo clic en el botón (?) de la esquina inferior derecha.
Assembled Para obter assistência, contacte a equipa **{supportTeamName}** clicando no botão (?) no canto inferior direito.
Assembled サポートが必要な場合は、右下の (?) ボタンをクリックして **{supportTeamName}** にお問い合わせください。
auto
Assembled macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} Required
Assembled macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} Required
Assembled macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} erforderlich
Assembled mise a jour macOS obligatoire
Assembled {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} obligatoria de macOS
Assembled {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade} obrigatória do macOS
Assembled macOSの{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade}が必要です
Assembled Open Software Update
Assembled Open Software Update
Assembled Softwareupdate oeffnen
Assembled Ouvrir Mise a jour de logiciels
Assembled Abrir Actualización de software
Assembled Abrir Atualização de software
Assembled ソフトウェア・アップデートを開く
Assembled Remind Me Later
Assembled Remind Me Later
Assembled Spaeter erinnern
Assembled Me le rappeler plus tard
Assembled Recordármelo más tarde
Assembled Lembrar-me mais tarde
Assembled 後で通知
Assembled Update macOS on Mac
Assembled Update macOS on Mac
Assembled macOS auf Mac aktualisieren
Assembled Mettre a jour macOS sur Mac
Assembled Actualizar macOS en el Mac
Assembled Atualizar macOS no Mac
Assembled MacでmacOSをアップデート
Assembled **Note:** Your Mac has been powered-on for **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. For more reliable results, please manually restart your Mac before proceeding.
Assembled **Note:** Your Mac has been powered-on for **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. For more reliable results, please manually restart your Mac before proceeding.
Assembled **Hinweis:** Ihr Mac laeuft seit **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Starten Sie ihn fuer zuverlaessigere Ergebnisse bitte manuell neu.
Assembled **Note :** Votre Mac est allume depuis **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Redemarrez-le manuellement pour de meilleurs resultats.
Assembled **Nota:** Su Mac lleva **{uptimeHumanReadable}** encendido. Para obtener resultados más fiables, reinícielo manualmente antes de continuar.
Assembled **Nota:** O seu Mac está ligado há **{uptimeHumanReadable}**. Para resultados mais fiáveis, reinicie-o manualmente antes de continuar.
Assembled **注意:** このMacは **{uptimeHumanReadable}** の間、再起動されていません。より確実に実行するため、続行前に手動で再起動してください。
Assembled **Note:** Your Mac has only **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, which may prevent this macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}.
Assembled **Note:** Your Mac has only **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, which may prevent this macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l}.
Assembled **Hinweis:** Ihr Mac hat nur **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** frei. Dadurch kann dieses macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} scheitern.
Assembled **Note :** Votre Mac ne dispose que de **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, ce qui peut empecher cette {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} macOS.
Assembled **Nota:** Su Mac solo dispone de **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}**, lo que puede impedir esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} de macOS.
Assembled **Nota:** O seu Mac tem apenas **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** livres, o que pode impedir esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} do macOS.
Assembled **注意:** このMacの空き容量は **{diskSpaceHumanReadable}** しかないため、このmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} を実行できない可能性があります。
Assembled **Good news!** The macOS {ddmVersionString} update has already been downloaded to your Mac and is ready to install. Installation will proceed quickly when you click **{button1text}**.
Assembled **Good news!** The macOS {ddmVersionString} update has already been downloaded to your Mac and is ready to install. Installation will proceed quickly when you click **{button1text}**.
Assembled **Gute Nachricht!** Das macOS-{ddmVersionString}-Update wurde bereits geladen. Die Installation startet schnell, wenn Sie **{button1text}** klicken.
Assembled **Bonne nouvelle !** La mise a jour macOS {ddmVersionString} est deja telechargee. L'installation sera rapide apres clic sur **{button1text}**.

Assembled **¡Buenas noticias!** La actualización de macOS {ddmVersionString} ya se ha descargado en su Mac y está lista para instalarse. La instalación será más rápida cuando haga clic en **{button1text}**.

Assembled **Boas notícias!** A atualização do macOS {ddmVersionString} já foi descarregada para o seu Mac e está pronta para instalar. A instalação será mais rápida quando clicar em **{button1text}**.
Assembled **お知らせ:** macOS {ddmVersionString} アップデートはすでにこのMacにダウンロードされており、インストールの準備ができています。**{button1text}** をクリックすると、すばやくインストールできます。
Assembled Your Mac has begun downloading and preparing required macOS update components. Installation will be quicker once all assets have finished staging.
Assembled Your Mac has begun downloading and preparing required macOS update components. Installation will be quicker once all assets have finished staging.
Assembled Ihr Mac laedt bereits erforderliche macOS-Update-Komponenten herunter und bereitet sie vor. Die Installation wird danach schneller sein.
Assembled Votre Mac a commence a telecharger et preparer les composants requis de mise a jour macOS. L'installation sera ensuite plus rapide.
Assembled Su Mac ha comenzado a descargar y preparar los componentes necesarios de actualización de macOS. La instalación será más rápida cuando finalice la preparación de todos los recursos.
Assembled O seu Mac começou a descarregar e a preparar os componentes necessários da atualização do macOS. A instalação será mais rápida quando todos os recursos estiverem preparados.
Assembled このMacでは、必要なmacOSアップデートコンポーネントのダウンロードと準備が進行中です。すべての項目の準備が完了すると、インストールはより短時間で完了します。
Assembled Your Mac will begin downloading the update shortly.
Assembled Your Mac will begin downloading the update shortly.
Assembled Ihr Mac beginnt in Kuerze mit dem Download des Updates.
Assembled Votre Mac commencera bientot a telecharger la mise a jour.
Assembled Su Mac comenzará a descargar la actualización en breve.
Assembled O seu Mac irá começar a descarregar a atualização em breve.
Assembled このMacはまもなくアップデートのダウンロードを開始します。

Assembled **A required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} is now available**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} to macOS **{ddmVersionString}** to ensure your Mac remains secure and compliant with organizational policies.{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

If you are unable to perform this {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button2text}** to be reminded again later (which is disabled when the deadline is imminent).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled **A required macOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} is now available**

Greetings, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Please {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} to macOS **{ddmVersionString}** to ensure your Mac remains secure and compliant with organizational policies.{updateReadyMessage}

To perform the {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button1text}**, review the on-screen instructions, then click **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

If you are unable to perform this {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} now, click **{button2text}** to be reminded again later (which is disabled when the deadline is imminent).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled **Ein erforderliches macOS-{titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} ist jetzt verfuegbar**

Hallo, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Bitte {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} Sie auf macOS **{ddmVersionString}**, damit Ihr Mac sicher bleibt und den organisatorischen Richtlinien entspricht.{updateReadyMessage}

Um die {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} jetzt durchzufuehren, klicken Sie auf **{button1text}**, folgen Sie den Anweisungen auf dem Bildschirm und klicken Sie dann auf **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Wenn Sie diese {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} jetzt nicht durchfuehren koennen, klicken Sie auf **{button2text}**, um spaeter erneut erinnert zu werden (diese Option wird deaktiviert, wenn die Frist unmittelbar bevorsteht).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled **Une {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} macOS requise est maintenant disponible**

Bonjour, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Veuillez effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} vers macOS **{ddmVersionString}** afin de maintenir la securite et la conformite de votre Mac aux politiques de votre organisation.{updateReadyMessage}

Pour effectuer la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button1text}**, suivez les instructions a l'ecran, puis cliquez sur **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Si vous ne pouvez pas effectuer cette {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} maintenant, cliquez sur **{button2text}** pour recevoir un nouveau rappel plus tard (ce bouton est desactive lorsque l'echeance est imminente).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled **Ya está disponible una {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} obligatoria de macOS**

¡Feliz {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Realice la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} a macOS **{ddmVersionString}** para mantener su Mac seguro y en cumplimiento con las políticas de la organización.{updateReadyMessage}

Para realizar la {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} ahora, haga clic en **{button1text}**, revise las instrucciones en pantalla y luego haga clic en **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Si no puede realizar esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} ahora, haga clic en **{button2text}** para recibir otro recordatorio más tarde (esta opción se desactiva cuando se acerca la fecha límite).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled **Já está disponível uma {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} obrigatória do macOS**

Feliz {weekday}, {loggedInUserFirstname}!

Efetue a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} para o macOS **{ddmVersionString}** para manter o seu Mac seguro e em conformidade com as políticas da organização.{updateReadyMessage}

Para efetuar a {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} agora, clique em **{button1text}**, siga as instruções no ecrã e depois clique em **{softwareUpdateButtonText}**.

Se não puder efetuar esta {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} agora, clique em **{button2text}** para receber outro lembrete mais tarde (esta opção fica desativada quando o prazo se aproxima).

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled **必須のmacOS {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} を利用できます**

{loggedInUserFirstname}さん、{weekday}もお疲れさまです。

Macを安全に保ち、組織のポリシーに準拠するため、macOS **{ddmVersionString}** へ {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} してください。{updateReadyMessage}

今すぐ {titleMessageUpdateOrUpgrade:l} するには、**{button1text}** をクリックし、画面の案内を確認したあと **{softwareUpdateButtonText}** をクリックしてください。

今すぐ実行できない場合は、**{button2text}** をクリックして後で再通知を受けてください（期限が近づくとこのオプションは無効になります）。

{deadlineEnforcementMessage}{excessiveUptimeWarningMessage}{diskSpaceWarningMessage}{supportAssistanceMessage}

Assembled

**{infoboxLabelCurrent}:** macOS {installedmacOSVersion}

**{infoboxLabelRequired}:** macOS {ddmVersionString}

**{infoboxLabelDeadline}:** {infoboxDeadlineDisplay}

**{infoboxLabelDaysRemaining}:** {infoboxDaysRemainingDisplay}

**{infoboxLabelLastRestart}:** {infoboxLastRestartDisplay}

**{infoboxLabelFreeDiskSpace}:** {diskSpaceHumanReadable}

Assembled

- **Telephone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Website:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Knowledge Base Article:** {supportKBURL}

**User Information:**
- **Full Name:** {userfullname}
- **User Name:** {username}

**Computer Information:**
- **Computer Name:** {computername}
- **Serial Number:** {serialnumber}
- **macOS:** {osversion}

**Script Information:**
- **Dialog:** {dialogVersion}
- **Script:** {scriptVersion}

Assembled

Para obter assistência, contacte: **{supportTeamName}**
- **Telefone:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **Email:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Site web:** {supportTeamWebsite}
- **Artigo da base de conhecimento:** {supportKBURL}

Assembled

サポートが必要な場合は次までご連絡ください: **{supportTeamName}**
- **電話:** {supportTeamPhone}
- **メール:** {supportTeamEmail}
- **Webサイト:** {supportTeamWebsite}

qr={infobuttonaction}
